title: Release automation can be manually dispatched on master
content: Automated Release workflow supports workflow_dispatch on master and will create a tag/release using package.json version when the tag does not already exist. Push event itself is a no-op for release job.
fingerprint: build::release automation can be manually dispatched on master::automated release workflow supports workflow_dispatch on master and will create a tag/release using package.json version when the tag does not already exist. push event itself is a no-op for release job.

title: Safe refresh preserves curated context docs
content: In refresh-existing safe mode (`preserveContextFiles=true`), generator now preserves existing curated files including stack.md, architecture.md, conventions.md, existing-ai-context.md, context-budget.md, protected-blocks.md, and .github/COPILOT_CONTEXT.md, unless user opts into regenerate-context.
fingerprint: conventions::safe refresh preserves curated context docs::in refresh-existing safe mode (`preservecontextfiles=true`), generator now preserves existing curated files including stack.md, architecture.md, conventions.md, existing-ai-context.md, context-budget.md, protected-blocks.md, and .github/copilot_context.md, unless user opts into regenerate-context.

title: Update checker uses published Git tags
content: AI OS update checks now derive latest version from GitHub tags (`git ls-remote --tags --refs`) and use that resolvable tag as latest; update commands are emitted with quoted package spec (`npx -y "github:marinvch/ai-os#vX.Y.Z" --refresh-existing`) to be safe in Bash.
fingerprint: build::update checker uses published git tags::ai os update checks now derive latest version from github tags (`git ls-remote --tags --refs`) and use that resolvable tag as latest; update commands are emitted with quoted package spec (`npx -y "github:marinvch/ai-os#vx.y.z" --refresh-existing`) to be safe in bash.

title: Session continuity MCP tools
content: AI OS now includes persistent session continuity tools in MCP runtime: get_active_plan, upsert_active_plan, append_checkpoint, close_checkpoint, record_failure_pattern, and compact_session_context. Runtime handlers are wired in src/mcp-server/index.ts, tool contracts are defined in src/mcp-tools.ts, and behavior is validated by src/tests/session-continuity.test.ts.
fingerprint: architecture::session continuity mcp tools::ai os now includes persistent session continuity tools in mcp runtime: get_active_plan, upsert_active_plan, append_checkpoint, close_checkpoint, record_failure_pattern, and compact_session_context. runtime handlers are wired in src/mcp-server/index.ts, tool contracts are defined in src/mcp-tools.ts, and behavior is validated by src/tests/session-continuity.test.ts.

title: Validation workflow includes ops and smoke gates
content: AI OS Validate workflow now runs `npm run validate:ops` and `npm run validate:smoke` on pull requests, and runs `npm run validate:full` followed by `npm run validate:smoke` on push events.
fingerprint: testing::validation workflow includes ops and smoke gates::ai os validate workflow now runs `npm run validate:ops` and `npm run validate:smoke` on pull requests, and runs `npm run validate:full` followed by `npm run validate:smoke` on push events.

title: Smoke validation command
content: The repository now supports `npm run validate:smoke` (src/validation/smoke.ts) to quickly verify AI OS enhancement health, including context files, persistent rules, scorecard freshness, and generator plan/preview modes.
fingerprint: testing::smoke validation command::the repository now supports `npm run validate:smoke` (src/validation/smoke.ts) to quickly verify ai os enhancement health, including context files, persistent rules, scorecard freshness, and generator plan/preview modes.

title: Scorecard freshness gate
content: The repository includes npm script `scorecard:check` (src/validation/scorecard-check.ts) to enforce that the latest weekly entry in .github/ai-os/metrics/scorecard.json is not older than 14 days by default. `validate:ops` runs validate:fast and scorecard:check.
fingerprint: testing::scorecard freshness gate::the repository includes npm script `scorecard:check` (src/validation/scorecard-check.ts) to enforce that the latest weekly entry in .github/ai-os/metrics/scorecard.json is not older than 14 days by default. `validate:ops` runs validate:fast and scorecard:check.

title: Weekly quality scorecard workflow
content: AI OS now tracks weekly quality metrics in .github/ai-os/metrics/scorecard.json using npm scripts `scorecard:update` and `scorecard:show` backed by src/validation/scorecard.ts.
fingerprint: testing::weekly quality scorecard workflow::ai os now tracks weekly quality metrics in .github/ai-os/metrics/scorecard.json using npm scripts `scorecard:update` and `scorecard:show` backed by src/validation/scorecard.ts.

title: Build and test commands
content: The repository builds with `npm run build` and tests with `npm test` (Vitest). Both commands succeeded in the current repo state.
fingerprint: build::build and test commands::the repository builds with `npm run build` and tests with `npm test` (vitest). both commands succeeded in the current repo state.
